title: Reliance Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Reliance Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Reliance Retail invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Floor Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Reliance Retail:
Reliance Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Retail!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
